guiAdapterCompositionRoots.reason: GUI may instantiate external adapters only at its local composition root.

cliAdapterCompositionRoots.reason: CLI adapter imports are confined to the CLI composition root until the boundary is derived from the consumer graph.
W5/F5 moves CLI adapter selection into an explicit registry composition root so commands request capabilities instead of importing concrete adapters.

cliAdapterKnownDebt.reason: Existing CLI command adapter import debt predates the external allowlist policy and is tracked as boundary debt.
